target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible black covering on right side of building; some windows appear broken or missing; facade shows signs of wear; structural framing appears intact; damage extent cannot be precisely quantified due to partial view and lack of clear damage metrics.

summary: One building assessed with LIGHT damage, confidence POSSIBLE, showing black covering on right side, broken windows, and facade wear. The overall scene depicts a large, multi-story building labeled "АВТОВОКЗАЛ" (Bus Station) with visible pedestrian and vehicle activity, and a partially obscured structure to the right. The assessed building’s damage suggests limited functional impact on its primary operations, though structural integrity appears intact.
